Description: Detected a Generic API Key, potentially exposing access to various services and sensitive operations.
Author: goncalo.gomes
Message:
feat(phase-0): verification spikes — resume+model, tailscale, gh

Run the three brief-mandated spikes before Phase 2:
- claude --resume <id> --model <new>: context preserved (haiku → sonnet recall
  of an exact phrase). Phase 2.5 proceeds with --resume.
- tailscale status --json: well-formed; canonical hostname is
  CertDomains[0] or Self.DNSName (trailing dot stripped). Resolver upgrade
  deferred to Phase 2.
- gh pr create --fill --draft: full round-trip works against
  gongiskhan/agent-garrison. PR opened and closed cleanly.

Notes committed under docs/phases/spike-*.md; src/lib/tailscale.ts untouched
in this phase.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Description: Detected a Generic API Key, potentially exposing access to various services and sensitive operations.
Author: ggomes
Message:
design: outpost protocol v1 spec

PHASE_6_PROTOCOL.md — the T0 deliverable. Documents the full
outpost bridge wire protocol: WebSocket/JSON envelope, auth
handshake, all process/fs/git/exec operations, event types,
reconnect + heartbeat + cancellation semantics, error enum, and
a worked wire trace (create-worktree → spawn PTY → send-input →
kill).

Three deliberate additions over the brief's literal operation list,
driven by inspection of existing trenches/session-view/worktree code:
• process.resize + pty/cols/rows on spawn (PTY terminals require it)
• handle (opaque UUID) instead of pid (PTY pids get reused)
• base_branch on git.create_worktree; repo_path on delete_worktree;
  ports + env_files on list_worktrees entries (from .garrison-meta.json)

Also bundles PHASE_6_EXECUTION.md and PHASE_6_T0_BRIEF.md (staged
as part of the user's roadmap session).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Description: Detected a Generic API Key, potentially exposing access to various services and sensitive operations.
Author: goncalo.gomes
Message:
improver: ecosystem update phases + reapply sweep; track own-port UI dist

- improver: ecosystem-update/-phases, reapply-sweep, composition-dir, json-log libs;
  review-queue + apply-core + improver.mjs/server.mjs + UI updates (autothing run output)
- http-gateway: gateway-pty tweak
- track hand-authored own-port UI dist bundles (browser/dev-env/improver/model-router/
  monitor/outpost/screen-share) per the fittings/seed/*/dist convention
- docs: DECISIONS + autothing friction-log + walkthrough notes + run record
